execution_rules.browser_regression_needs: Chrome + Playwright; workbench target also needs free ports 8787/5180; mark blocked (never skip-as-pass) if unavailable

decision_log.decision: implementation branch feat/graph-renderer-coordination-split from spark branch
decision_log.reason: carry spec+plan into impl branch; repo rule: code changes on feat/ branch

decision_log.decision: add controller layer id to architecture.ts owner map
decision_log.reason: controller is a distinct owner per spec core principle

decision_log.decision: split render() into applyOptionChanges + rebuildAndPaint before extraction
decision_log.reason: state-apply belongs to command side, rebuild/paint to pipeline

decision_log.decision: explicit GraphRenderContext held by root: graph/dom pipeline-written (others read); pinState/simulation written by BOTH controller and pipeline; runtimeState owns semantic state [corrected by eng-review C1]
decision_log.reason: codex proved controller writes pinState on drag-end and drives simulation, so the earlier pipeline-only-write rule was wrong

decision_log.decision: controller may toggle is-dragging/focus affordances on painted elements; forbidden to build/paint graph DOM
decision_log.reason: matches real code; hard ban would over-indirect

decision_log.decision: [A1] root injects a GraphCommands interface into render-pipeline mount* (no controller<->pipeline cycle)
decision_log.reason: mount* callbacks call controller commands while controller depends on pipeline; interface injection keeps deps acyclic

decision_log.decision: [A2+CQ3] single root.render(opts) = applyOptionChanges(state) + pipeline.rebuildAndPaint (pure); all ~18 call sites use it
decision_log.reason: pipeline must not write selection/focus/pin; apply logic must not duplicate across 18 sites

decision_log.decision: [C1] Phase 1.0 designs full context + 4 interfaces before moving code
decision_log.reason: codex: otherwise Phase1 builds ad-hoc callback bags and Phase2 rewrites them = interface redesign hidden in a move

decision_log.decision: [C2] explicit render-epoch + teardown contract + lifecycle tests
decision_log.reason: render re-entry, animateDiff async race, and destroy ordering are silent-failure seams in a pure move

decision_log.decision: [C3] CSS block (ensureStaticRendererStyles) goes to render-pipeline; accept clean rename (no external consumer of createStaticGraphRenderer though it is in the export* surface); soften acceptance wording; runtime boundary probes mandatory; community-wash regression runs in Phase 2
decision_log.reason: batch of low-cost hardenings from codex outside voice

turn_log.notes: Created feat/graph-renderer-coordination-split and recorded green graph-engine smoke baseline; no feature code changed.
Recorded full green baseline and dense-wheel fps 50.2; Phase 0 acceptance passed.
Expanded the plan with the full GraphRenderContext field set and concrete GraphController/GraphRenderPipeline/GraphOverlaysPresenter/GraphCommands signatures; no implementation code moved.
Introduced root-owned GraphRenderContext in static-renderer.ts and moved context-owned closure state access behind the context object without user-visible behavior changes.
Extracted controller.ts for gesture intent dispatch, viewport handler wiring, node click/drag, blank click, and node-drag helpers; static-renderer now creates and delegates to the controller.
Moved semantic commands, search commands, toolbar close, interaction clearing, community focus/select, reset/retreat, and document key routing into controller.ts; Phase 1 acceptance passed.
